title: The Progressive Corporation 2024 Annual Report
note: Primary source for Progressive's business lines, distribution, policies in force, net premiums written, net income, underwriting margin, market capitalization at 2024 year-end, and public offering reference.

title: Progressive (PGR) - Market capitalization
note: Market-data source for Progressive's May 2026 market capitalization and market-cap ranking.

title: Snapshot Rewards You for Good Driving
note: Official product page describing Snapshot as Progressive's usage-based insurance program and citing discounts distributed since 2009.

title: Snapshot Frequently Asked Questions
note: Official FAQ describing Snapshot's mobile app and plug-in device options and the driving behaviors used for pricing.

title: Snapshot Terms and Conditions
note: Official terms documenting Snapshot program conditions and patent notices relevant to the defensibility of Progressive's telematics model.

title: Etherisc | Make Insurance Fair and Accessible
note: Project source describing Etherisc as a decentralized insurance protocol for building insurance products, risk pools, and oracle-connected coverage.

title: Etherisc Documentation
note: Technical documentation for Etherisc's Generic Insurance Framework, smart contracts, staking, and decentralized insurance architecture.

title: Etherisc GitHub Organization
note: Public code organization supporting the openness assessment for Etherisc.

title: Teambrella: A Peer-to-Peer Insurance System
note: Whitepaper source for a peer-to-peer insurance model using team governance and member claim evaluation.

title: Verifiable Credentials Data Model
note: Open standard reference for portable, cryptographically verifiable claims used in the user-owned telematics risk passport concept.
